source: FIFA official references + structured secondary fixture tables (cross-checked) + seeded sample results
notes: Full 48-team groups and 104-match schedule are present. Group-stage fixtures (1-72) come from structured secondary tables and were cross-checked against FIFA official references; knockout pathways and times are normalized from FIFA schedule materials. Opening-round match results (1-24) are currently seeded sample scores for standings/UI validation and will be replaced with official results.
